# Mobile Fauna  

\newpage

## Brachiopods  
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(9)
```

## Crustaceans
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 44:48){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Echinoderms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 49:66){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Fish
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 67:69){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Jellies
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 75:78){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Molluscs
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 86:91){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Seaspiders
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(92)
```

## Worms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 112:121){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
